016package org.consensusj.analytics.service;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
020
021import java.util.ArrayList;
022import java.util.Collections;
023import java.util.List;
024
025/**
026 * Response format for Omni rich list queries.
027 * 
028 * TODO: Jackson annotations?
029 */
030public class TokenRichList<N extends Number & Comparable<? super N>, ID> {
031    private final int blockHeight;
032    private final Sha256Hash blockHash;
033    private final long timestamp;
034    private final ID currencyID;
035    private final List<TokenBalancePair<N>> richList;
036    private final N otherBalanceTotal;
037    
038    public TokenRichList(int blockHeight,
039                         Sha256Hash blockHash,
040                         long timestamp,
041                         ID currencyID,
042                         List<TokenBalancePair<N>> richList,
043                         N otherBalanceTotal) {
044        this.blockHeight = blockHeight;
045        this.blockHash = blockHash;
046        this.timestamp = timestamp;
047        this.currencyID = currencyID;
048        this.richList = Collections.unmodifiableList(new ArrayList<>(richList));
049        this.otherBalanceTotal = otherBalanceTotal;
050    }
051
052    public static class TokenBalancePair<N extends Number & Comparable<? super N>> {
053        private final Address address;
054        private final N balance;
055
056        public TokenBalancePair(Address address, N balance) {
057            this.address = address;
058            this.balance = balance;
059        }
060
061        public Address getAddress() {
062            return address;
063        }
064
065        public N getBalance() {
066            return balance;
067        }
068    }
069
070    public int getBlockHeight() {
071        return blockHeight;
072    }
073
074    public Sha256Hash getBlockHash() {
075        return blockHash;
076    }
077
078    public long getTimestamp() {
079        return timestamp;
080    }
081
082    public ID getCurrencyID() {
083        return currencyID;
084    }
085
086    public List<TokenBalancePair<N>> getRichList() {
087        return richList;
088    }
089
090    public N getOtherBalanceTotal() {
091        return otherBalanceTotal;
092    }
093}
